name: ExtensionImplementationGuide_Definition_Parameter_Code
title: R5: Code that identifies parameter additional types
description: R5: `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` additional types (Coding) additional types from child elements (userSelected)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` 1..1 `Coding`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` 1..1 `Coding`
*  R4B: `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` do not cover the following types: Coding.
The mappings for `ImplementationGuide.definition.parameter.code` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: userSelected.
